name: Putting Ladder

equipment: Tees or markers at 3, 6, 9, and 12 feet
setup.description: Place two balls at each distance: 3, 6, 9, and 12 feet from the hole.

rules.description: Putt out both balls at 3 feet before moving to 6, then 9, then 12. Work up the ladder in order.

caption: 3, 6, 9, 12 — the ladder doesn't care how good yesterday's round was. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
